positive: Minimalist illustration of a celestial forest scene. Towering bioluminescent trees with glowing leaves and crystalline branches dominate the composition. A gentle, stylized arc of a crescent moon hangs in the deep indigo sky, casting soft, ethereal light. Shooting stars trail vibrant gold and teal streaks through the atmosphere. The ground is covered in glowing, fantastical flora and smooth river stones. Overall aesthetic is modern fantasy, clean vector line work mixed with subtle digital painting textures. High contrast, strong central vertical axis, limited but vibrant palette of deep blues, electric turquoise, glowing gold, and cool lavender. Perfect for repeating textile pattern or single-focus apparel print. --ar 1:1 --style highly detailed --v 6.0
